data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for 'Upgrade/downgrade with proration', but there is no evidence indicating that this functionality has been tested or confirmed. The prior steps do not include any successful evidence of an upgrade or downgrade process that applies proration, which is a critical aspect of the requirement. The failure of previous validation steps (e.g., uc-need-validate-1 and uc-need-validate-2) indicates that there are issues with the membership plans that could affect the ability to validate this requirement.
gaps: No evidence of successful upgrade/downgrade with proration functionality.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
